steps.title: Use the direction of the line
steps.content: The line of best fit goes downward from left to right, so its slope is negative. That eliminates the positive choices.

steps.title: Estimate the steepness
steps.content: The line decreases moderately, by less than $1$ unit of $y$ for each $1$ unit of $x$. That is close to $-0.73$, not a steep slope like $-12.14$. The answer is C.
